englishDefinitions: In a way that shows you are very aware of yourself and worried about how you appear to others.
Deliberately and with awareness of style or form.
persianTranslation: با خجالت و آگاهی از خود
examples: He smiled self-consciously at the camera.
She self-consciously adjusted her dress before entering the room.
The novel is written self-consciously, with many references to other books.
